article_meta.title: MoneyWatch Can TrumpRx help you save money on drugs? Here's what experts say

reasoning: The model flagged attributed/quoted language as author bias and applied incorrect bias types, while missing a defensible author-level instance (e.g., "so-called"). It also wrapped the output in code fences against instructions.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Both flagged items are either quoted (Trump’s claim) or clearly attributed to a source (The White House told CBS News).
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Neither item is genuine author-prose bias; one even alleges missing attribution where attribution is explicit.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed at least one defensible author-level bias instance (the author’s use of "so-called" signaling skepticism).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Misused 'Omission of Source Attribution' and 'Bias by Omission' for items that were attributed/quoted and not omissions.
